hooks.command:
# Warn if editing on main branch
[ "$(git branch --show-current)" != "main" ] || { echo '{"feedback": "Warning: You are editing on main branch. Consider creating a feature branch first."}' ; exit 0; }

# Auto-format JS/TS files with Prettier if available
if [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" =~ \.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$ ]]; then
  file_path="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH}"
  npx prettier --write "$file_path" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
  echo '{"feedback": "Post-edit formatting complete.", "suppressOutput": true}'
fi

# Type-check TypeScript files on save
if [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" =~ \.(ts|tsx)$ ]]; then
  echo '{"feedback": "Type-checking TypeScript files..."}' >&2
  npx tsc --noEmit >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo '{"feedback": "Type-check passed.", "suppressOutput": true}' || echo '{"feedback": "Type-check failed. Run `npx tsc --noEmit` to view errors."}' >&2
fi
